Description: Anti-pattern: process.env.X || 'literal' â€” literal acts as production fallback (INC-001, INC-002, INC-003 repeat offender)
Author: Frank Spooren
Message:
fix: gateway-level content cache invalidation on all mutation endpoints

Added invalidateContentCache() helper that clears concepts-list,
content-items, and content-calendar cache namespaces.

Applied to: manual item create, concept generate, concept update,
concept delete, item update. Previously only concept title PATCH
had invalidation â€” manual creates were invisible for up to 5 min.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Anti-pattern: process.env.X || 'literal' â€” literal acts as production fallback (INC-001, INC-002, INC-003 repeat offender)
Author: Frank Spooren
Message:
fix: invalidate tenant cache after concept title update

PATCH /content/concepts/:id now calls tenantCacheService.invalidateNamespace()
after UPDATE. Previously, GET /content/concepts returned stale cached data
(5min TTL) showing old title in Items table and Calendar after rename.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Anti-pattern: process.env.X || 'literal' â€” literal acts as production fallback (INC-001, INC-002, INC-003 repeat offender)
Author: Frank Spooren
Message:
feat(workflow): v4.92.0 - Enterprise DTO/Resource + FSM + data reparatie

NEW patterns enterprise-grade:
- ContentItemResource (src/resources/) - DTO Pattern V1 met versioned schemas
  - Eliminieert duplicate image-hydration code over GET endpoints
  - Frontend krijgt altijd images: [{id,url,thumbnail,alt_text,width,height,mime_type,source}]
  - Industry pattern: Laravel API Resources, Spring DTOs, .NET ResponseModels
  - Fixes Issue B (blanco image linkerpaneel) via geforceerde hydratie

- approvalStateMachine.js - Finite State Machine
  - 15-state TRANSITIONS matrix met explicit allow-lists per state
  - canTransition + transitionStatus + bulkTransitionStatus + deriveConceptStatus
  - InvalidTransitionError (HTTP 409) op ongeldige overgang
  - Pattern: DDD Aggregate met Invariants

FSM integratie 3 kritieke endpoints:
- /content/concepts/:id/approve: whitelist (skip scheduled/publishing/published) - Issue D fix
- /content/items/:id/reschedule: set approval_status=scheduled samen met scheduled_at - Issue C fix
- syncConceptStatusByConceptId: gebruikt FSM deriveConceptStatus die scheduled_at meeneemt

Migration 008 data reparatie:
- Jumbo items 265+266: approved+scheduled_at -> scheduled+scheduled_at (consistent)
- Platform-breed alle items met approved+future_scheduled_at -> scheduled
- Concept-level statuses re-synced via FSM-priority derivation
- Concept 180 (Jumbo): approved -> scheduled (now matches items)

Frontend clean rebuild (Vite cache cleared):
- ContentStudioPage-4b72ef0d.js bevat v4.91.1 Fix C (.body||g.body_en) verified
- Hallucination badge code aanwezig in bundle (4x Z.hallucination_warning)

ContentItemResource live tested (Jumbo item 265):
- 7 images correct hydrated met url/thumbnail/alt_text/width/height
- approval_status=approved, scheduled_at=2026-05-16 (before migration 008)

FSM live tested:
- TRANSITIONS: 15 states
- approved->scheduled: true, scheduled->draft: false (blocked)
- deriveConceptStatus Jumbo scenario: scheduled (correct)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Anti-pattern: process.env.X || 'literal' â€” literal acts as production fallback (INC-001, INC-002, INC-003 repeat offender)
Author: Frank Spooren
Message:
fix: Content Studio 8 bugs + UX herschikking + i18n completeness

- Fix duplicatie-titel: concept titel als bron, strip (kopie) suffixen
- Fix bulk approve bug: itemIdsâ†’numericIds variabele
- Fix kalender dubbel-telling: exclusieve OR condities
- Fix scheduling: approval trail + concept sync + alleen approved items
- Nieuw: POST /content/concepts/:id/approve (alle kanalen in 1x)
- UX: Beoordeling geÃ¯ntegreerd in Acties-blok (3-stappen workflow)
- UX: Auto Hashtags verplaatst naar linker paneel icon-reeks
- UX: Info-blok verplaatst naar onderaan rechterpaneel
- UX: Blok-volgorde: Actiesâ†’Kwaliteitâ†’Previewâ†’Performanceâ†’Workflowâ†’Commentsâ†’Info
- UX: Optimistic chip updates na approve/publish/schedule
- UX: Nederlandse status labels (Goedgekeurd, Concept, Afgewezen, Gepland)
- Multi-image selectie voor social posts (platform-specifieke limieten)
- i18n: FR taal key toegevoegd aan alle 5 taalbestanden
- i18n: FR calendar/sources/performance/seasons volledig vertaald
- i18n: contentTypes keys in alle 5 talen
- contentService.js: approveConcept() methode

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Description: Anti-pattern: process.env.X || 'literal' â€” literal acts as production fallback (INC-001, INC-002, INC-003 repeat offender)
Author: Frank Spooren
Message:
fix: permanent verwijderen acties werkt nu correct (is_permanently_deleted kolom)

Root cause: DELETE endpoint verwijderde de state-rij uit DB, waardoor het
actie-item weer verscheen als nieuw (geen dismissed state meer).

Fix: is_permanently_deleted kolom toegevoegd aan dashboard_action_states.
DELETE endpoint zet nu is_permanently_deleted=1 i.p.v. rij te verwijderen.
Frontend isEffectivelyDismissed() checkt deze vlag eerst.
Permanent verwijderde items verschijnen niet meer in verborgen-menu.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Author: Frank Spooren
Message:
fix: 8 ecosystem tekortkomingen â€” enterprise level compliance

#1 Boekhouder: $providerâ†’$service fix + budget â‚¬515â†’â‚¬470 (12 providers)
   Budget nu: Claude â‚¬110, Anthropic â‚¬30, Mistral â‚¬20, DeepL â‚¬30,
   Apify â‚¬85, Perplexity â‚¬25, SA â‚¬20, Unsplash â‚¬15, Hetzner â‚¬15,
   MailerLite â‚¬15, OVH â‚¬25, Meta â‚¬80

#2 Daily Briefing: 8 nieuwe agent secties toegevoegd
   Vertaler coverage, Boekhouder kosten, Anomaliedetective spikes,
   Performance Wachter endpoints, Auditeur compliance, Helpdeskmeester
   tickets, Reisleider SA stats, Verfrisser stale POIs, open issues count

#3 Vertaler: hardcoded LANGS â†’ destinations.supported_languages per destination
   BUTE/Texel/Calpe krijgen nu correcte taalset

#4 Personaliseerder: brand_profile gekoppeld uit destinations tabel
   focus_categories boost (1.3x) in recommendation scoring

#5 Personaliseerder: OpenWeatherMap real-time weer in context enrichment

#6 Reisleider: Simple Analytics API gekoppeld (pageviews + visitors + top pages)

#8 Maestro: taakbeschrijving 18â†’39 agents, 40â†’94 jobs

Description: Anti-pattern: process.env.X || 'literal' â€” literal acts as production fallback (INC-001, INC-002, INC-003 repeat offender)
Author: Frank Spooren
Message:
feat: Content Studio Enterprise + BUTE Taal-Pipeline + Publiqio CORS â€” v4.67.0, MS v8.21

Content Studio:
- Image reorder: pijltjes-patroon (POI Management), loadImages() self-loading
- Backend resolved_images sort op media_ids volgorde
- MUI Icons bundel 9.5MBâ†’2.8MB (barrelâ†’path imports)

BUTE Taal-Pipeline:
- contentGenerator.js destination-aware (body_<sourceLang>)
- Backfill 20 items body_enâ†’NULL
- PATCH enforcement single-language destinations
- destination_config in GET /content/items/:id response
- Frontend LANGS uit item.destination_config (backend-driven)

Publiqio.com:
- Apache CORS dubbele headers verwijderd
- ProxyTimeout 120s, retry=0
- VITE_API_URL leeg (same-origin proxy)

Message:
[Admin Portal UX/UI Overhaul]: 14 opdrachten â€” Dashboard redesign, sidebar herstructurering, Merk Profiel compact, standalone login, SimpleAnalytics, cross-sectie data, visuele consistentie, empty states, i18n

- Opdracht 1: Dashboard action-oriented redesign + GET /dashboard/actions

- Opdracht 4-5: BrandingPage 4 clickable kaarten (2x2), SettingsPage cleanup
- Opdracht 6: Pagina's+Navigatie samengevoegd (PagesNavigationPage)
- Opdracht 7: Mediabibliotheek directe links (Content Studio + BrandingPage)
- Opdracht 8: studio.holidaibutler.com standalone login (USP's, vergelijkingstabel, swipe carousel)
- Opdracht 9: Cross-sectie data (SEO keywordsâ†’trending, 5â˜… reviewsâ†’suggesties)

- Opdracht 11: Visuele consistentie (41 fixes: dark mode, Skeleton, table headers)
- Opdracht 12: Empty states & onboarding hints (7 pagina's)
- Opdracht 13: i18n verificatie (~60 hardcoded stringsâ†’t() calls)
- Social: CalpeTrip Facebook+Instagram gekoppeld
- CORS fix: dubbele header Apache+Expressâ†’alleen Express
- Video upload 40MB, media accept uitgebreid

Description: MongoDB connection string with embedded credentials
Author: Frank Spooren
Message:
fix(customer): restore single sticky date header with date-grouped events

- ONE sticky date header that updates based on visible section
- Events grouped by date (Jan 20 events separate from Jan 21, etc.)
- No per-section date headers - only the sticky header in filter row
- IntersectionObserver detects which date section is visible
- Sticky header automatically updates when scrolling to new date

This matches the original Main configuration while ensuring events
from different dates are properly separated.

Description: Anti-pattern: process.env.X || 'literal' â€” literal acts as production fallback (INC-001, INC-002, INC-003 repeat offender)
Author: Frank Spooren
Message:
fix(customer): restore single sticky date header with date-grouped events

- ONE sticky date header that updates based on visible section
- Events grouped by date (Jan 20 events separate from Jan 21, etc.)
- No per-section date headers - only the sticky header in filter row
- IntersectionObserver detects which date section is visible
- Sticky header automatically updates when scrolling to new date

This matches the original Main configuration while ensuring events
from different dates are properly separated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Author: Claude
Message:
Add Warredal Candidate Matcher - Complete recruitment application

Built a comprehensive enterprise-grade candidate matching tool for Warredal with the following features:

Backend (Node.js + Express + PostgreSQL):
- Complete REST API with authentication (JWT)
- LinkedIn scraping service (Puppeteer)
- Intelligent matching engine with weighted criteria
- MailerLite integration for AI message generation
- Flexible scoring system for any vacancy
- Excel export functionality
- Prepared structure for LinkedIn Recruiter API

Frontend (React + Vite + TailwindCSS):
- Mobile-first responsive dashboard
- Vacancy management with flexible criteria
- Candidate pipeline tracking
- Message generation and sending
- Real-time scoring visualization
- Authentication and authorization

Infrastructure:
- Docker + Docker Compose setup
- Nginx reverse proxy configuration
- Automated setup script for Hetzner deployment
- Complete deployment documentation
- User manual in Dutch

Features:
âœ“ LinkedIn public profile scraping
âœ“ Automated candidate scoring (education, experience, skills, network)
âœ“ AI-powered personalized message generation
âœ“ MailerLite email campaign integration
âœ“ Complete candidate pipeline (sourced â†’ hired)
âœ“ Excel export with scores and contact details
âœ“ Mobile-optimized interface
âœ“ Role-based access control
âœ“ Rate limiting and security headers

Documentation:
- README.md: Complete technical overview
- DEPLOYMENT.md: Full deployment guide for Hetzner
- GEBRUIKERSHANDLEIDING.md: Comprehensive user manual (Dutch)
- setup.sh: Automated installation script

Specific for Warredal Marketing & Sales vacancy in Maaseik with criteria:
- Higher education (marketing, communication, tourism)
- Belgian/Dutch nationality
- 5+ years experience in tourism & marketing
- B2B network in Flanders
- Leadership experience
- Soft skills (teamplayer, analytical, commercial, proactive)
